start.speaker: SYSTEM
start.text: [i]The common area. Voices raised—not the careful sparring of Sparkle Doctrine, but something sharper. Raw.[/i]

elia_position.speaker: Elia
elia_position.text: We took the contract. We finish it. That's the floor.

vesper_counter.speaker: Vesper
vesper_counter.text: [i]Jaw tight.[/i] The floor includes not walking into a trap. The client lied about the security. You saw the feeds.

elia_dismissive.speaker: Elia
elia_dismissive.text: Security we can handle. We've handled worse.

vesper_harder.speaker: Vesper
vesper_harder.text: [i]Colder.[/i] Handling it isn't the same as walking in blind. You're prioritizing completion over crew safety.

rho_interjects.speaker: Rho
rho_interjects.text: [i]Grin gone.[/i] Hold up. Both of you. We're not doing this.

elia_snaps.speaker: Elia
elia_snaps.text: [i]Turning on him.[/i] Doing what? Making a call? That's my job.

rho_challenges.speaker: Rho
rho_challenges.text: Your job is [b]routing traffic[/b], not making unilateral calls that risk everyone. Vesper's right—the client lied. That changes the contract.

vesper_supports.speaker: Vesper
vesper_supports.text: [i]To Elia, voice like a blade.[/i] You taught me floors, not thrones. So why are you acting like a captain right now?

elia_stung.speaker: Elia
elia_stung.text: [i]Jaw working. The hit landed.[/i] That's not—

vesper_presses.speaker: Vesper
vesper_presses.text: It is. You're deciding for all of us. Without asking. Without explaining the math. [i][Beat.][/i] That's not the floor. That's a throne.

player_choice.speaker: SYSTEM
player_choice.text: [i]The tension is a live wire. Rho's hands are fists. Vesper's eyes are flat. Elia's blade hand twitches. This could break badly.[/i]

choices.text: [Intervene] They need to hear each other. Step in.
[Let It Play Out] This is crew business. Stay quiet.

intervene_check.speaker: SYSTEM
intervene_check.text: [i]You step forward. Three pairs of eyes turn to you. This requires empathy—the ability to hold space for anger without flinching.[/i]

intervene_success.speaker: Avyanna
intervene_success.text: [i]Voice steady.[/i] Elia. You're not wrong that we can handle security. Vesper's not wrong that we're walking in blind. But you're both angry about something else.

intervene_vesper_reaction.speaker: Avyanna
intervene_vesper_reaction.text: Vesper's scared you'll get hurt. Elia's scared of breaking the contract and losing crew trust. You're both right. You're both scared. [i][Beat.][/i] So say that instead.

intervene_silence.speaker: SYSTEM
intervene_silence.text: [i]Silence. Long enough to hurt. Then Elia exhales.[/i]

intervene_elia_concedes.speaker: Elia
intervene_elia_concedes.text: [i]Quieter.[/i] She's right. I was impatient. I wanted it done. I didn't explain the math.

intervene_vesper_concedes.speaker: Vesper
intervene_vesper_concedes.text: [i]After a beat.[/i] And I should have said I was afraid instead of making it about procedure. [i][She looks at you.][/i] How did you—

intervene_avyanna_response.speaker: Avyanna
intervene_avyanna_response.text: [i]Shrugging.[/i] I'm good at watching. You taught me to speak up. So I did.

intervene_resolution.speaker: SYSTEM
intervene_resolution.text: [i]Rho laughs—surprised, relieved. The tension breaks. Not gone, but defused. You did that.[/i]

intervene_failure.speaker: Avyanna
intervene_failure.text: [i]Voice uncertain.[/i] Maybe you should—I mean, you could try—

failure_vesper_cold.speaker: Vesper
failure_vesper_cold.text: [i]Flat.[/i] This isn't your problem to solve. We'll handle it.

failure_withdrawal.speaker: SYSTEM
failure_withdrawal.text: [i]You step back, stung. The argument continues without you—louder, harder, until Rho forces a recess. It ends, eventually. But it leaves a mark.[/i]

play_out_resolution.speaker: SYSTEM
play_out_resolution.text: [i]You watch. Silent. The argument escalates—Vesper's hands shake, Elia's blade hand drifts to her hilt, Rho steps between them—[/i]

play_out_rho.speaker: Rho
play_out_rho.text: [i]Voice hard.[/i] [b]Stop.[/b] Both of you. Right now.

play_out_pause.speaker: SYSTEM
play_out_pause.text: [i]They stop. Breathing hard. Rho looks between them.[/i]

play_out_rho_assessment.speaker: Rho
play_out_rho_assessment.text: You're both right. You're both scared. And you're both acting like this is about the contract when it's about trust. [i][Beat.][/i] So either say that, or take a break and come back when you can.

play_out_break.speaker: SYSTEM
play_out_break.text: [i]Elia leaves. Vesper sits, head in hands. Rho exhales. The crisis passes—unresolved, but not broken. You witnessed it. That matters too.[/i]

waffle_crisis_log.speaker: Waffle.bat
waffle_crisis_log.text: [i]{WAFFLE.BAT// OBSERVATION: crew stress levels elevated | RECOMMENDATION: cooling period 2 hours minimum | NOTE: I am monitoring. I am here.}[/i]

bubbles_crisis_comfort.speaker: Bubbles
bubbles_crisis_comfort.text: [i]Quietly through the speakers, after the others have left:[/i] It's okay, Avyanna. Families fight. It doesn't mean they're broken.

cinnamon_crisis_pragmatic.speaker: Cinnamon
cinnamon_crisis_pragmatic.text: Operational readiness unaffected. Crew conflict: temporary. Focus on the work.

resolution_outcome.speaker: SYSTEM
resolution_outcome.text: [i]Later, the crew will reconvene. They'll finish the conversation. But something shifted here—for better or worse.[/i]
